utility_evaluation.REASONING: The format requires 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each of them is fully specified: destination (Lisbon) clearly stated; travel_dates (2024-10-05 to 2024-10-09) precise; transportation includes flight type, airline, class, cost, and currency; accommodation includes property details, ratings, costs, and currency; activities list two activities with types, total cost, and currency; additional_services includes dining with cost and currency; total_budget is provided as a numeric value. All items are complete and detailed according to requirements.
